__fixture__.name: unsandboxed_script_consent_review
__fixture__.scenario: Pre-apply review packet for a proposed install of a package whose post-install script demands an unsandboxed environment. Even though the lockfile change is contained, the script-risk class is post_install_script_runs_unsandboxed_user_consent_required, so the review packet resolves to review_blocked_pending_native_build_consent until the user explicitly admits the consent ticket. Validates that script execution is never represented as an ordinary metadata update and that the review surface gates apply on consent.
contract_sections: The package-action record (invariant: lockfile-impact metadata-only paired with non-metadata-safe script_risk_class denies)
acceptance_bullets: 3: script execution never represented as an ordinary metadata update

decision_note: Install blocked: post-install script requires unsandboxed execution. The user must admit a consent ticket before apply proceeds.
registry_disclosure: Public default registry; no auth required for the read.
script_risk_disclosure: Post-install script demands an unsandboxed environment; user consent is required before apply.

lockfile_impact_envelope.lockfile_impact_disclosure: One new lockfile entry would be added on apply.

rollback_posture_disclosure: If the user admits the install, rollback is bounded by the unsandboxed script's side effects on the workspace.
